author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
bahujanma⋅bhāgyavaśe, cinmaya madhura rase,
spṛhā janme jīvera hiyāya
sei spṛhā lobha hañā, vraja-dhāme jīve lañā,
rūpānuga⋅bhajane mātāya

bhajana⋅prakāra jata, sakalera sāra mata,
śikhāila śrī⋅rūpa gosāñi
se bhajana nā jāniyā, kṛṣṇa bhajibāre giyā,
tuccha kāje jīvana kāṭāi

bujhibāre se bhajana, bahu jatne akiñcana,
viracila bhajana⋅darpaṇa
vraje rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅sevā, karite utsuka jebā,
sukhe te̐ha karuna śravaṇa

lobhete janama pāi, atiśīghra bāḍi jāi,
śraddhā, rati, tabe haya prīti
sahaja bhajana rati, nāhi cāya śikṣā mati,
tabu śikṣā prāthamika rīti

putra-sneha jananīra, sahaja hṛdaye sthira,
dūṣita hṛdaye śikṣā cāi
kṛṣṇaprema seirūpa, nityasiddha aparūpa,
baddha-jīve aprakaṭa bhāi

sei ta’ sahaja rati, pāiyāche apagati,
śikṣānuśīlana jadi pāya
se rati jāgiyā uṭhe, jīvera bandhana chuṭe,
vrajānanda tāhāre nācāya
en_translation:
Due to the good fortune accumulated over many births, a desire awakens in the heart of the soul for the spiritual, sweet taste of devotion. That desire, turning into intense greed, takes the soul to Vraja-dhāma and intoxicates one in devotional service following Śrī Rūpa Gosāñi.

All types of devotional service, their essence, were taught by Śrī Rūpa Gosāñi. Not knowing that service, when I go to worship Kṛṣṇa, I spend my life in insignificant activities.

To understand that worship, with great effort, the humble one composed Bhajana-darpaṇa. Whoever is eager to perform the service of Rādhā and Kṛṣṇa in Vraja, may they happily listen.

Born from intense greed, I quickly grow. First comes faith, then attachment, and finally pure love develops. Natural attachment to devotional service does not desire education or intellect; still, education is the primary method.

A mother's affection for her son is naturally fixed in her heart. In a polluted heart, education is needed. Love for Kṛṣṇa is like that - eternally perfect, unparalleled. In the conditioned soul, it is unmanifest, brother.

That natural attachment has attained a degraded state. If it receives education and practice, that attachment awakens, the soul's bondage breaks, and the bliss of Vraja makes one dance.
